ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the course is offered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instructor was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instructor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the instructor teaches the course (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the instructor teaches the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., rating, text) */,
  "scale" INTEGER /* Scale of the question (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback response */,
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course-instructor relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback question */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., 92%, 4.55) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response (if applicable) */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who provided the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_course_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_instructor_id") REFERENCES course_instructors ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES feedback_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the student is expected to graduate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the student is enrolled in the course (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the student is enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade the student received in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "question_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-category relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_categories_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES feedback_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feedback_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback summary */,
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course-instructor relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback question */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses for the question */,
  "excellent_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Excellent' */,
  "very_good_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Very Good' */,
  "good_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Good' */,
  "fair_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Fair' */,
  "unsatisfactory_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Unsatisfactory' */,
  "instructor_mean" REAL /* Mean score for the instructor */,
  "fas_mean" REAL /* Mean score for the FAS (Faculty Assessment System) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_summaries_course_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_instructor_id") REFERENCES course_instructors ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_summaries_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES feedback_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, instructor, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES students ("student_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course-instructor relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback question */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the feedback was collected (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the feedback was collected */,
  "responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses for the question */,
  "excellent_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Excellent' */,
  "very_good_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Very Good' */,
  "good_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Good' */,
  "fair_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Fair' */,
  "unsatisfactory_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses rated as 'Unsatisfactory' */,
  "instructor_mean" REAL /* Mean score for the instructor */,
  "fas_mean" REAL /* Mean score for the FAS (Faculty Assessment System) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES feedback_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_course_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_instructor_id") REFERENCES course_instructors ("course_instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
